reviews.title: The first time is also the last time, not up to 4-star standard.
reviews.text:
I booked room 403 (2 connecting rooms) for 1 night on December 28, coinciding with the hot air balloon festival, at a price of nearly 2,300,000. The hotel’s interior is degraded, not worthy of a 4-star level.
- The key card door: it’s unresponsive; it takes a lot of time to get into the room each time we return.
- The 2 connecting rooms have 2 entrances, but only one key card, allowing access to only one door.
- In the room, there is 1 bathroom with a bathtub but no shower area. The bathroom is designed near the second entrance (this door can be opened with a key card, but the hotel has not set it up), causing inconvenience for guests coming from the beach; they have to enter from door one, take a U-turn to access the bathroom at door two, resulting in sand falling all over the room and bathroom.
- I informed the reception to remind the housekeeping staff to sweep the sand in the room and replace the bathroom mat, and also to clean the bathroom because there was a lot of sand. In the evening, after the family returned from dinner, the bathroom was full of sand. The housekeeping staff blamed it on only hearing about replacing the bathroom mat, asking, "Did you not see the sand?" Walking barefoot, don’t you see the bathroom floor full of sand when replacing the mat?
- The breakfast buffet had very few poor-quality items, just like some 2-3 star hotels. It was the first time I saw a so-called 4-star hotel buffet line that had boiled potatoes, boiled corn, sticky rice with sausage, and bread as the main options (2 boxes of sausages at most). The guava was mushy; when cutting it, couldn’t they see it was going to be mushy? Why serve that to guests? My child is still small, and at the drink station, there were no straws available. I asked a staff member who was refilling juice at that moment. The staff member looked at me wide-eyed; I explained that I needed a straw for the kid, and then the staff walked away. I thought they were going to get the straws, so I waited for about 10 minutes, and that male staff member kept circling around my table (I was sitting close to the drink station). I got so annoyed that when a female manager passed by, I asked for a straw, and at that moment, that same male staff member brought the straws to us. Is ignoring a request from a small customer worthy of 4 stars?
- The pillow is extremely high and hard, making it difficult for older children to lie down. Even I felt neck pain lying on it. All the 4-star and 5-star hotels I’ve been to have 2-3 standard pillows suitable for all ages. I called the reception, and they answered with just one sentence that they only have that one size pillow; I felt disappointed already. Then I asked for 2 large bath towels to stack for the child to lie on. More than 30 minutes later (around 10:30 PM), the housekeeping staff knocked loudly on the door to deliver the towels. (My room had 2 small children, and the loud knocking felt like debt collectors knocking; why didn’t they ring the bell?)
- On Agoda, it says the hotel has been recently renovated. But the room has wallpaper that is poorly patched together. Not to mention the lobby is extremely hot. During the day, the outside temperature is stuffy, and the air conditioning in the lobby is not on.
- The pool seems to exist just for show, smaller than the kids’ pool in my apartment building, just like the fish ponds in koi coffee shops in SG, and the pool doesn’t even have a roof. No guests swam there. My family went up to check it out for the kids to play, and there was no lifeguard despite the pool having a depth of 1.4 to 1.6 meters. Is it safe enough for guests to operate? 
It falls far short of Muong Thanh in Phan Thiet and Nha Trang; I wonder if this place is under the same ownership? Or is it a franchise that is vastly inferior?
reviews.response:
Lời chào trân trọng từ khách sạn Khách sạn Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu. Chân thành cảm ơn quý khách đã chọn Mường Thanh Holiday Vũng Tàu là địa điểm nghỉ dưỡng cho chuyến du lịch vừa qua và để lại những dòng nhận xét quý giá. Khách sạn rất xin lỗi với những vấn đề anh chị gặp phải và đã triển khai các giải pháp giải quyết những vấn đề này. Rất mong rằng Khách sạn có cơ hội đón tiếp anh chị lần nữa trong những dịp không xa để trải nghiệm dịch vụ hoàn hảo hơn và sẽ nhận được phản hồi sớm của anh chị ngay trong thời gian lưu trú. 
Trân Trọng, 
Nguyễn Kế Mão Giám 
Đốc Khách sạn

reviews.title: So disappointed!
reviews.text: Im shocked! It’s not true to what’s rating⭐️ on the website. So disappointed !  We booked 2 rooms for 6 nights., one room smelled urine, the other rooms shower head drooping down, so I had to use the small bath towel to tie to keep it from hanging dangling down. Water took so long to get warm. I caught a croach and killed it right away before my girls see it in the bathroom. My very first morning breakfast with my husband,  the baby gecko falling from the ceiling and landed on my husbands head. He felt something on his hair and slightly flicked the hair  and the baby gecko falling and crawling on the table.  Luckily not falling into his bowl of noodle.   I did video  record it Theres very few food like nothing to select.  No refund,  no apology, no nothing.  So from that day, my family had to go out look for breakfast every morning.  Toward to the  5th day,  we gave up one room, and kept one room  just to  keep our luggage’s  for the next two days.  From what I see, this hotel would be shut down soon.  I really do want my money back if I can.  It’s really ruined my vacation.

reviews.title: Frugal & Humid
reviews.text:
The staff at Muong Thanh Holiday Vung Tau Hotel left us feeling uncomfortable throughout our stay. The lobby was humid and hot, and the hallway also felt excessively warm.

The bathroom had visible mold, which was disappointing and concerning.

We also had a frustrating departure experience: they would not let us leave until everything in the hotel was counted for. We argued that we did not use their towels, but later found out the towels were left short by housekeeping. They blamed us for missing towels, even though we don’t use hotel towels.

Overall, we rate our stay 2 stars

reviews.title: Was beautiful
reviews.text: We haves stayed at this 4 star hotel many times but no more after this last stay. Hotel staff has a big problem with quality. Stayed 3 nights and floor never swept or mopped. The furniture was dusty. No hot water the 1st day. A technician from the hotel was in the room for over 1 hour and said hot water. Later checked and no hot water. Another technician was in the room and also said, hot water. Checked and no hot water. The 3rd technician finally fixed the hot water. Breakfast the hard boiled eggs were almost raw. The hotel is still beautiful but deteriorating due to lazy employees.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Randall,
Thank you for coming back with us during your recent trip to Vung Tau. I am in receipt of your feedback of our services and facilities. I truly regret that our hot water quality did not meet your expectation which I have addressed to our Chief Engineer - Mr. Hải to take action for improvement. Regarding the floor and the furniture was dusty, I do apologise for the inconvenience. Our Executive House Keeping have deeply inspected the entire hotel to fix. And the about the boiled egg, our Executive Chef - Mr. Trãi do taken action for correct boiled-timing suitable with different customer. 
Please rest assured that your feedback has been sincerely and seriously taken by the team for further work. Again, I do apologise and seek for your kind understanding. I look forward to welcoming you back to the hotel for a much better experience. At that time, I would like to avail myself to facilitate your booking and stay. 
Best regards,
Hoang Hung
Hotel manager

Breakfast is terrible ! Fruits in VN are so cheap they just give watermelon guava for breakfast , coffee are cold and served in an expresso cup ???
Juice mixed with lots of water and serve only one kind of… very tiny sponge cake slices look dirt cheap!
Not much authentic vietnamese food 
They don’t serve ham just slices of hotdog … overall food which they serve are very cheap and not tasty!

Về buffet sáng, chúng tôi ghi nhận phản hồi về việc thực đơn trùng lặp và sẽ làm việc lại với bộ phận F&B để cải thiện sự đa dạng trong thời gian tới.

Đặc biệt, chúng tôi rất tiếc khi thái độ phục vụ của nhân viên lễ tân chưa mang lại cảm giác thoải mái cho anh/chị. Khách sạn đã tiếp nhận thông tin và sẽ chấn chỉnh, đào tạo lại để đảm bảo chất lượng dịch vụ đúng như cam kết.

Mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp và mang đến cho anh/chị trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong những lần sau. 
Trân trong,
Phạm Tấn Oai
Giám đốc khách sạn.

reviews.title: Poor experience with a big hotel
reviews.text:
I have some positive reviews about the hotel: 
1/ Good location, convenient for travel. 
2/ The hotel is large, the breakfast is not too delicious but can be considered acceptable. 
That's all the good points. The bad points are as follows: 
1/ The reception staff do not respect customers. They were laughing and joking continuously with other staff while checking in guests. 
2/ The hotel lobby is very hot. 
3/ The towels, although there is a notice to reuse them to protect the environment, are stained yellow and look very dirty. 
4/ The air conditioning is very noisy, buzzing all night, so I had to stay up late to be able to sleep because I was exhausted. 
In summary, for that price range, there are countless other options.
reviews.response:
Kính Gửi anh Phan Nhat Thanh,

reviews.title: The connecting room is  unlike other hotels
reviews.text:
I often booked a connecting room at other hotels in various parts of the world. This time, I also booked a connecting room in Muong Thanh (#803). And I was surprised because this room only has one bathroom for a total of four people divided into two rooms separated by a door. Usually in another hotel each room will have its own bathroom. The connecting room I ordered in Muong Thanh is just only have 1 bathroom. 
And what surprised me again was that the room's exit door was only 1 door 😄 
I think, if its only have one door, then the name is not a connecting room, but 1 big room (or whatever is the name in the hotel term).
The second matter is that the view to the sea is only a small part, just as big as a small window.  
I think they must be more honest in providing information about their hotel.

reviews.title: Need Renovation and some areas need to be worked on like professionalism!
reviews.text:
I've stayed at Nha Trang Mường Thanh and it is absolutely gorgeous, much closer to the beach at half the price, better food, exceptional friendly  service staff with prompt response when I addressed deficiency such as my shower water leaky to the floor, flexible & accommodating compared to this OLDER Vũng Tàu it needs a lot of work both in terms of building renovation and staff professionalism.  

I wanna point out the highlights, the room is beautiful, clean and AC is quiet.  You are entitle to 2 free water bottles of 300ish ML... Just don't touch the 500ish ML or you'll get charged.  

The front beach is about 400 meters possibly further and the location is a 5 minute walk to Highland's coffee and eateries making it easy to get around.

The first night of checking in was cordial and polite with hotel reception and I wasn't sure if I was able to make it so my wife and son arrived earlier than I did as I was at the Nighmare "The Sóng" Hotel trying to figure out with whether I should stay for the next 4 nights booked there.  Read my other review if you're interested... 

At Mường Thanh, the room was for 2 people, I checked in and told them I am a 3rd person which they did charge me as an extra person which is understandable and I accepted.

What I didn't expect was that the hotel clerk was so stingy when I ask for a Highland instant coffee bag and was told the standard is only 2 for the room.  However, as I already paid 300k as a 3rd guest and a buffet was included for the duration of my 3 night stay, think I should be able to enjoy a cup of coffee with my wife and son too.  Why cheap out on a 5k vnd bag of something like that compared to a buffet???  It makes no sense at all so I was only given 1 bag for myself for the first night.  
It didn't feel like a luxury hotel but more of a 1 star Motel which left a sour taste in my mind.

The next morning coming down for the main floor buffet, I was expecting the same awesome food buffet as Nha Trang... it was soooo disappointing.  Just 2 short row of foods (Not 4), the coffee area tea area was crawling with ants or some kind of bugs attracted to the condense milk.  The vn noodle soup was ok, the spaghetti pasta with sauce was tasteless like it came out of a can.  I had such high hopes... oh well.

The next night got weirder when I took out the garbage as the bucket in the bathroom was full and I needed to empty it... so I took it upon myself to remove it and take the bag outside.  Went downstair to hotel lobby to ask the reception staffs where the trash container was... waiting, waiting and two men were deep in dispute about something and neither one took a notice of me... Hmmm i thought, screw this, I'll find a bin myself so I walk out of the hotel look to my right and see one.  Popped it in, done!  When i came back to the lobby desk... those 2 were still disagreeing and walked right past them thinking this is NOT good.  Never argue in front of a hotel guest, the image and reputation of your luxury Mường Thanh is like that garbage I took out.  

The next 2nd morning buffet was moved to the 2nd floor and I didn't know as I didn't see a sign so went to the hotel lobby and the female staff was friendly enough to let me know it moved.  Up I went, and oh boy what a difference... the food improved... partly because it was new year and more guests arrived and more space was needed.  By the third night, we moved to a larger suite with a better ocean view.  We were able to see the fireworks from the hotel which was nice.  In summary, MT hotel was a reasonable escape from the Song hotel.  Would I come back and stay here... probably NOT unless I had no other options... the facilities is old, the carpet, the walls, if you stand by the elevators and walk towards the glass window view, look down and you will see the outside steel nuts and bolts hanging out holding the glass and structure together.

By the way, I love your cleaning staff lady.  We didn't need our room to be made, just extra towels

reviews.title: Không xứng với cái mác 4 sao.
reviews.text:
Mường Thanh vốn nổi danh nên khi đi khá kỳ vọng. Về phòng ốc khá sạch sẽ, giường nệm thoải mái, phòng tắm đầy đủ mấy thứ linh tinh cần thiết, nhưng về tổng thể thì như phòng khách sạn bình thường, không xứng đáng 4 sao, và máy lạnh thì rất lâu lạnh, 2 tiếng đầu mở phòng ko mát nổi. Nhân viên okay, không niềm nở cũng không lạnh nhạt. Buffet sáng vô cùng bình thường, không món nào ngon hay đặc sắc, còn thua cả buffet ăn ở khách sạn 3 sao. Tổng thể mà nói, trải nghiệm ở Mường Thanh ổn, nhưng ko có gì đặc sắc và chắc chắn ko tới mức 4 sao. Mong Mường Thanh sẽ cải thiện và live up to the expectation. 
À, phòng gym rất cũ và dơ, không sử dụng được. 
.
I really had high expectation for Muong Thanh since it has a big reputation in Vietnam. However, it didn’t live up to my expectation. Overall, my stay here wasn’t bad, it was just very... average, nothing really stood out. The room was quite comfortable, the problem was the AC, which didn’t work well. It took about 3 hours for us to feel fine. The room was just like any 3 star hotel room we used to stay in. The gym was in bad conditoon, old and dusty. The morning buffet disappointed me, it didn’t have both the variety and the taste. 
To be honest, I felt okay with the stay, but Muong Thanh really needs to step up their game to keep the good reputation.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi anh Khanh,

Những góp ý chân thành của quý khách về cơ sở vật chất sẽ được chuyển đến các bộ phận để xem lại và có biện pháp cải thiện với mong muốn ngày càng nâng cao hơn nữa chất lượng các dịch vụ. Khách sạn rất mong sẽ có cơ hội khác được đón tiếp và phục vụ anh trong một dịp gần nhất để trải nghiệm dịch vụ tốt hơn. 
Trân trọng cảm ơn,
Ban Giám Đốc khách sạn Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu

reviews.title: Pool needs a clean
reviews.text: Staff were welcoming so thankyou for that. The pool however desperately needs a clean. The water is green and there is mould growing on the tiles. Not very nice when the beach water is dirty as also. Alot of racist local people on the streets too. Not the hotels fault. Won't be going to Vung Tau again sorry.

reviews.title: Breakfast
reviews.text: Breakfast is just so so

reviews.title: Nice Staff! Family run feeling about the hotel....
reviews.text:
The hotel is new and clean, the staff were friendly and very willing to help.  Unfortunately, the 6 AM breakfast service was never set up on time and they were still laying stuff out at 6:30.
Note to management "Bacon, sausage and other breakfast goodies are best served hot, or at least warm, and a bain marie only works if there is a heat source!"
There are older and cheaper hotels that offer a better dining experience, so I don't think I will try here again....

reviews.title: Okay with a price range under 2 million.
reviews.text:
Advantages: close to the coastal road, walking distance to the bustling dining area at Bai Trước. Staff is friendly and polite. Rooms are spacious and clean.  
Disadvantages: the hotel is a bit old. Weak water pressure. Limited breakfast options. Only one packet of 3-in-1 coffee/tea provided per day, not sure what savings they are trying to achieve with this item.
reviews.response: Kính gửi Quý khách, Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi về kỳ nghỉ của mình. Chúng tôi chân thành xin lỗi vì trải nghiệm của Quý khách chưa được như mong đợi. Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận ý kiến của Quý khách và đang tiếp tục rà soát, cải thiện quy trình cũng như cách tiếp nhận và xử lý các yêu cầu đặc biệt, nhằm đảm bảo mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn và hạn chế những bất tiện tương tự trong tương lai. Một lần nữa, chúng tôi rất tiếc về sự bất tiện này và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách tốt hơn trong thời gian tới. Trân trọng Lê Quang Sáng Giám Đốc Khách Sạn

reviews.title: Spa facilities and room appliances
reviews.text: My staying experience at Muong Thanh Hotel is relatively good overall. The hotel facilities are generally clean and well-kept and its location is central and quiet of the front beach comparison to the hustle-bustle of the back beach in Vung Tau. My spa experience was really and totally disappointed. The faculty is old and run-down at the basement-level. The staff in the spa in my opinion is lack of training as well as communication in serving the guest/s. Even though I had already paid for the massage service, but I ended up left the spa without getting its services and professional courtesy from the staff. A complete disappointment but I did not let it ruin my day in Vung Tau.

reviews.title: Good for a weekend
reviews.text: Generally helpful staff, they apparantly have issues with guests stealing, so treat you accordingly. In my room the "hot water" was lukewarm and .. stingy on volume.  The shower drain was super slow, can never take a shower longer than 40 seconds. The bathroom needs  deep cleaning, the mold in the corners of the shower glass was annoying and obvious. Nice bed, new TV. Roomy room. No outlets for any electrical appliance with other than North American standard plug. The breakfast menu changed little from day to day. I would stay there again when in need,  but 4 star experience that may not be.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share such detailed feedback. We truly appreciate your comments, as they help us identify areas where we need to improve.

We’re glad to hear that you found our staff generally helpful and enjoyed the bed, the new TV, and the spacious room. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced regarding the hot water, shower drainage, bathroom cleanliness, power outlets, and the limited variation in our breakfast menu. These are certainly not the standards we aim to deliver, and your feedback has been shared with our management and technical teams for immediate review and improvement.

We regret if our security measures made you feel uncomfortable; they are in place to protect all guests, but we understand the importance of balancing safety with a welcoming experience.

Thank you for your honest assessment. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a more consistent experie

Cảm ơn anh/chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng cơ sở vật chất cũng như chất lượng bữa sáng chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của anh/chị, đặc biệt khi so sánh với các khách sạn cùng phân khúc  trong hệ thống.

reviews.title: Excellent staffs , great service.
reviews.text:
Check in was smoothly, great service by all the staffs . They went out of their way to help us and always making sure that we are comfortable and enjoy our holidays.  A special thanks to Van , the lady in the front desk , who was always smiling and response to our request . Keep up your good work guys , that was great.
The hotel location is close to the Front beach , it is just within walking distance.
The only downside of Muong Thanh is the building was old , room was starting  to wear out. It needs to be upgraded. Breakfast was ok , plenty of food to enjoy .
Overall it was a good place to stay after a long day exploring on the beach .
I would not hesitate to recommend Muong Thanh to my family and friends.

reviews.title: A bit far from the popular Tam Thang amusement park but suitable for the price.
reviews.text:
The price for a double room is around 900 without discounts, and there are no cheaper views.
- The staff was very welcoming and helped carry the luggage to the room; we arrived early at 1 PM and got a room right away.
- The room is tidy and meets standards, although it feels a bit outdated since the hotel was built a long time ago: the bathtub isn't suitable, there's no standing shower, the shower only has a handheld showerhead with no fixed shower, and the towels are very old and need to be replaced. Overall, it's also clean.
- The bed is comfortable, but the pillows have a slight musty smell, and there are a few mosquitoes in the room.
- The breakfast buffet is average, with few food options, and nothing impressive.
- The location is in the front beach area near the riverside park, convenient for those who want to visit Ganh Hao for a meal.
- It is a bit far from the busy and popular back beach area of Tam Thang.

A technician came to help me very promptly, and even though it was after 11 PM, the hotel was flexible and switched my room. The new room was clean, spacious, and odor-free, making it much more comfortable. 
A small suggestion is that the old room is fine as long as it is kept clean and odor-free, since a musty smell can easily ruin your mood upon entering. Overall, my experience was quite good, the staff was friendly and responsive.

reviews.title: Vacation
reviews.text:
During my stay at the Muong Thanh Hotel in Vung Tau, I found the experience to be quite pleasant overall, despite the hotel's somewhat dated appearance. The staff were warm and attentive, always eager to assist and make my stay as comfortable as possible. The room, although showing signs of age, was clean and well-maintained, with a lovely view that added to the charm.

The hotel’s facilities, including the spa and fitness center, were adequate, though they could benefit from some modernization. The breakfast buffet was a highlight, offering a wide variety of delicious options that catered to different tastes.

While I did notice that newer hotels in the area offer more modern amenities, Muong Thanh has its own unique appeal. It provides good value for money, especially if you appreciate a touch of old-school hospitality. If you’re looking for a welcoming atmosphere and attentive service, Muong Thanh Hotel is still a worthy choice.

reviews.title: Wonderful vacation
reviews.text: The room price on regular days is quite cheap. There is a basic breakfast buffet. The room cleaning is not very thorough. It's close to the beach. A downside is that the wifi on the 10th floor is too weak.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn anh/chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm tại khách sạn. Rất vui khi anh/chị hài lòng về mức giá ngày thường, buffet sáng và vị trí gần biển của Khách sạn Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì chất lượng dọn phòng và tín hiệu wifi tại lầu 10 chưa đáp ứng được mong đợi. Khách sạn đã ghi nhận phản ánh và sẽ kiểm tra, cải thiện ngay để đảm bảo trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho khách lưu trú.

Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp anh/chị lần sau với chất lượng dịch vụ hoàn thiện hơn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The newly built hotel has very new interiors, the rooms are clean, and the staff is very friendly and dedicated. Additionally, the breakfast is very delicious, the chicken pho is tender and flavorful, and the sticky rice is also incredibly tasty. My child really liked the soup, but it was a bit too watery, so adding a bit more toppings would be better. We booked a room without a sea view but could still see the ocean; the check-in was very nice, and the pool is a bit small, but the little kids had a lot of fun playing there. The staff monitored closely, which gave parents peace of mind. However, it would be better to have an additional trash bin in the living room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn gần bãi trước ra tắm biển rất tiện và gần công viên cho bạn nhỏ vui chơi. Bãi trước rất nhiều quán cafe chill chill. Sảnh ks đẹp rộng , san ks có chỗ để xe và giàn hoa đẹp, đi bộ đi dạo khu vực quanh đó cũng thuận tiện.  Bể bơi nhỏ và ko có bể cho em bé.

Lời chào trân trọng từ khách sạn Mường Thanh  Vung Tau Hotel.

Khách sạn xin được cảm ơn chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ cảm nhận của mình về quá trình chị lưu trú tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi rất vui khi đọc được những ý kiến phản hồi tích cực từ khách hàng đồng thời cũng xin tiếp thu những tồn đọng không đáng có và sẽ đưa ra những phương án giải quyết nhằm nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Cảm ơn chị một lần nữa vì đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của mình và chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ tiếp tục nhận được sự ủng hộ từ chị trong thời gian gần nhất.

reviews.title: Muong Thanh Vung Tau
reviews.text: The staff are enthusiastic and cheerful! The rooms are clean, and the location is close to Bai Trước beach. The breakfast buffet is acceptable. The swimming pool is a bit small.
reviews.response:
Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu xin cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian chia sẻ cảm nhận về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn 🥰

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết bạn hài lòng với sự nhiệt tình, vui vẻ của đội ngũ nhân viên, cũng như phòng ốc sạch sẽ và vị trí thuận tiện gần Bãi Trước. Đây luôn là một trong những điểm cộng được nhiều du khách yêu thích khi lưu trú tại Khách sạn Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận góp ý của bạn về buffet sáng và diện tích hồ bơi. Những chia sẻ chân thành này là cơ sở quan trọng để khách sạn tiếp tục cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ trong thời gian tới.

Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón bạn quay lại để mang đến một trải nghiệm trọn vẹn hơn nữa 💙
Trân trọng
Phạm Tấn Oai
Giám đốc khách sạn

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was truly my first experience at the Mường Thanh hotel chain. Arriving in Vũng Tàu early in the morning at 7 AM on the 6th, it was still very early. The staff member who took care of the motorbikes warmly welcomed me and inquired about my trip, making me really happy with the service. The reception staff were also enthusiastic and helpful, quickly assisting with my luggage and the check-in process. On the 6th, the hotel was fully booked, so I understood the situation. Luckily, the reception staff informed me that they could offer an early check-in. When I checked into room 907, it was quite busy, and though the room wasn't ready yet, I was understanding. Fortunately, I met some cleaning staff who told me to go to room 906, and soon a staff member came to quickly change my room key for me. The person was incredibly friendly. In the afternoon, I went to the beach, and there was a man at the luggage counter who guided me to the beach area, which was very nice. I played a lot and was too tired to have breakfast, which I regretted. We also wanted to extend our stay, but the hotel was fully booked that day. Next time, I will choose Mường Thanh to stay.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn bạn đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm vô cùng dễ thương và chi tiết về kỳ nghỉ tại khách sạn.

Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu rất vui khi biết rằng ngay từ những phút đầu tiên đặt chân tới khách sạn, bạn đã cảm nhận được sự nhiệt tình từ chú nhân viên trông xe, các bạn lễ tân cho đến đội ngũ buồng phòng và quầy gửi hành lý. Dù thời điểm cao điểm phòng kín và có chút sơ suất nhỏ trong khâu bàn giao phòng, nhưng thật may vì bạn đã thông cảm và vẫn giữ được cảm xúc tích cực trong suốt chuyến đi ❤️

Những lời khen dành cho các cô chú và các bạn nhân viên chắc chắn sẽ là động lực rất lớn để toàn bộ đội ngũ tiếp tục cố gắng hơn nữa trong việc mang đến dịch vụ chu đáo và ấm áp như gia đình.

Mường Thanh Vũng Tàu luôn sẵn sàng chào đón bạn trở lại! 💙
Trân trọng
Phạm Tấn Oai
Giám đốc khách sạn

reviews.title: Family room
reviews.text: Spacious room! Suitable for families! Our room has a large double bed and 2 single beds for my 2 kids! Cleaning the room is done without waiting for a request, just take advantage of breakfast to have the room tidied up neatly! The staff is very charming, from reception to the staff who carry luggage up and down! The food at the hotel is very delicious! There are very tasty meal combos! Suitable for children when they are tired, allowed to bring it up to the room! ❤️ In summary, I always love Muong Thanh hotel!

reviews.title: Family vacation
reviews.text: The hotel's location near the front beach is similar to other reviews. The hotel has a notable advantage that other hotels do not, which is having an electric car charging station located in the hotel parking lot. It can charge all types of vehicles. We stayed in a Deluxe Twin room. The hotel's Deluxe room is the largest among the Deluxe rooms of other hotels in Vung Tau that I've stayed in, with reasonable decor that creates a light and relaxing atmosphere for guests. The pool is not very clean. I hope the hotel will improve this in the future. The hotel is suitable for those who love fresh air as it is located in a green area, in a beautifully planned grid layout, not chaotic like the Thuy Van area at the back beach. The church and famous eateries like: Banh Mi Khong Ten, Rau Ma Ba Gia, Quan Ba Muoi, Ba Hung, Highland Coffee... have many well-known places near the hotel that you can walk to.

reviews.title: Fantastic hotel with amazing staff
reviews.text: Arrived at the hotel to be greeted by concierge opening the doors for us and carrying out suitcases.  Both young men were extremely helpful and courteous and received welcoming drinks.    We were extremely early for check in but asked if we could leave our luggage whilst we went out exploring.  Extremely central location with shops, bars, cafes, park and beach all within a few hundred metres.  Returned and checked in.  Fantastic room which was immaculate wirh views over the city.  We used the pool which was very clean.  Thete was also a gym but we didn't use it.   Breakfast had a vast choice of food and drinks.  Staff arranged a limousine minibus for our next days travel to Saigon.  Our only regret is that we did not stay for more than one night as there was so much to see and do in the area .  Time was running out we vastly under estimated how much Vietnam offered, visiting  11 locations .   Woyld definitely return to this hotel.  Fantastic value for money and all staff were superb.

Best regard,
Muong Thanh Vung Tau Hotel Managerment

ビーチが汚かったので（連休ですごい人で、果物の食べカスやらゴミやらがたくさん・・・）、プールがメインになってしまいましたが、プールが小さめで、子供用プールなどはありません。
でもスタッフは親切でしたし快適に過ごせました。

reviews.title: 위치상으로는 아주 좋습니다.
reviews.text: 걸어나가면 바로 해변가 입니다. 그리고 나와서 오른쪽 왼쪽 모두 밀집 지역이고 이만한 가격대비 좋은 위치는 없습니다. 다만 아쉬운게 한국사람들이 다소 싫어할만한 음식종류 및 음식류, 위생상태가 떨어지지만 그것들을 충분히 보완할만한 요소들이 많습니다. 호텔에서 오토바이도 빌려주니까 잘 이용하시면 좀더 효율적입니다.
reviews.response:
Thank you for choosing Muong Thanh Vung Tau Hotel as your recent accommodation during the time you was in Vung Tau City.
I was so regret to read your feedback that your stay did not meet your expectation. I already passed your constructive information to concerned department and the action for improvement was taken place in no time after your given notes to ensure hundreds of our guests experienced the most satisfaction. Thank you for your visit and we definitively action in due course.
Thank you for your stay with us and I look forward to another chance to look after you at next time you visit us.
Yours sincerely,
Hoang Hung
General Manager
